phrases.french: À quelle heure commence la prochaine visite ?
phrases.english: What time does the next tour start?
phrases.phonetic: ah kel UR koh-MONCE lah pro-SHEN vee-ZEET
phrases.context: Mumm runs regular cellar tours throughout the day. The Cordon Rouge is their flagship cuvée — recognisable by the red sash on the bottle.

phrases.french: Je voudrais goûter le Cordon Rouge.
phrases.english: I would like to taste the Cordon Rouge.
phrases.phonetic: zhuh voo-DRAY goo-TAY luh kor-DON ROOZH
phrases.context: Cordon Rouge is Mumm's iconic non-vintage champagne. Named for the red ribbon (cordon rouge) of the Légion d'honneur.

tips: Mumm is one of the most visitor-friendly houses — no need to book far in advance
Their cellars are more modern than Taittinger but the tasting experience is excellent
Mumm is the official champagne of Formula 1 — hence the podium celebrations
